name: Github: JS SDK
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The JavaScript SDK is available on GitHub with complete source code, documentation, and examples for implementing search and personalization features. This open-source availability enables developers to review implementation details, contribute improvements, and stay current with SDK updates while integrating platform capabilities."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Accessing the GitHub repository helps ensure you can understand SDK internals, review best practices, and implement features with confidence by referencing official examples and documentation maintained alongside the codebase."}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Repository"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "GitHub Repository: ", "bold": true}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://github.com/findify/findify-js/tree/master/packages/sdk", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "https://github.com/findify/findify-js/tree/master/packages/sdk"}]}]}]
